def suitable_for_pilates(self) -> bool:
        return (self.gender in ['male', 'female', 'gender neutral'] and
                self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61] and
                self.race in ['asian', 'white', 'hispanic', 'indian'] and
                self.employment_status != 'unemployed' and
                self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and
                self.marital_status in ['single', 'married'] and
                self.religion != 'atheist' and
                self.flexibility == 'high')
